judge_reason: Description B quotes specific verbatim text from a stamp ('4/23, 1954') and form fields not mentioned by Description A, which only describes the header area and '4-22', creating a factual inconsistency on quoted visual content.
original_image_tags: The top right corner of the page has "4-22" printed. The document header is stamped and typed.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A scanned FBI Records Section routing slip/form dated 4/23/1954, with multiple checkboxes, handwritten entries, file/room fields, and a vertical “FILE NUMBER / SERIAL” section at the bottom.*
